notes: Reddit post — lead not a primary source; removed from references
RCT: adding avocado to moderate-fat diet reduces LDL particle number and small dense LDL in overweight adults
Journal of Nutrition study on avocado consumption and cardiovascular biomarkers (not yet visited — reputable journal)
GRADE meta-analysis (2025): avocado products significantly reduce total cholesterol, LDL, and triglycerides
Systematic review and meta-analysis: avocado reduces TC and LDL in people with hypercholesterolemia; no negative weight impact
Harvard prospective cohort (68786 women, 41701 men, 30y): 2+ servings/week avocado associated with 16% lower CVD risk
HAT RCT ancillary (1008 adults, 26w): daily avocado increased gut microbial diversity and enriched F. prausnitzii; benefits strongest in low diet-quality subgroup
HAT RCT ancillary (969 adults, 26w): daily avocado improved LE8 subscores for diet quality, sleep, and blood lipids; overall CVD score not significant
